description: Detects English-language input. English is the hardest to detect via this engine because the English stop word filter removes the most common English function words (the, is, are, a, of, to, in). Phrases are therefore weighted toward distinctive content vocabulary, idioms, contractions, and informal markers that survive filtering: 'cheers', 'reckon', 'gonna', 'awesome', 'folks', 'workaround', 'lifesaver', 'touch base'. Both British and American English patterns are included.
